chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1119 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders as to maintainability of petition 25.11.2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG --------- On the last date of hearing i.e. 28.11.2024, following order was passed: “Counsel for the petitioner is put on notice to satisfy the Court about the maintainability of this petition, as reportedly the petitioner has already filed an application under Guardians and Wards Act for custody of the minors.” Today, no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner and the matter is fixed for maintainability. It appears that the parties have lost interest in pursuing this matter, besides on the same subject matter an application before the Guardians and Wards Act has also been filed, therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Nadir/PS
